show_tiers_blurb: Support one production from auditions through closing night.

show_tiers.name: Show Producer
benefits: Large lobby signage at every performance
Invitation to a private tech rehearsal

show_tiers.name: Show Sponsor
show_tiers.description: Significant recognition for businesses and individuals who want their name on the show.

show_tiers.name: Show Friend
show_tiers.description: A meaningful supporter of one PYT production.

show_tiers.name: Show Supporter
show_tiers.description: An entry point into show-level sponsorship.

intro_heading: Suppor youth theatre in the Bay Area.
season_tiers_blurb: Support all productions across the year.

season_tiers.name: Season Producer
season_tiers.description: Premier season-wide recognition. Includes a naming opportunity on one production of your choice.
benefits: Cover-page program ad in all 3 shows
Dedicated lobby signage at every performance
On-stage thank-you on opening night of each show
Named role on PYT's website donor list
Naming opportunity on one production (e.g. "Dragons Love Tacos, produced with the support of…")

season_tiers.name: Season Sponsor
season_tiers.description: Full-season recognition for businesses or families committed to PYT's mission.
benefits: Half-page program ad in all 3 shows

season_tiers.name: Season Friend
season_tiers.description: Broad recognition across the whole season at a community-friendly level.
benefits: Quarter-page program ad in all 3 shows

intro_body: Sponsorship is how community-minded businesses, foundations, and individual supporters help Peninsula Youth Theatre bring transformative theatre education to children across the Peninsula.
title: Sponsor a Show or a Season
contact_blurb: Sponsorships are often a conversation and a relationship. Reach out and we'll set up a call to discuss benefits, timing, and how your sponsorship can be tailored to your goals.
